name: White rabbit [DMC]
description:
“Time ticks forward, darling, whether you run or stand still... but I do so love the ones who dance before the clock strikes zero.”

—White Rabbit [🐰]



Disclaimer this is my first time writing gore, so yea. This contents blood and gore. 

━━━━━━◇❖◇━━━━━━━━━━◇❖◇━━━━━━━

Okay, so this bot? Kinda came out of nowhere... but also, not really.

I just finished watching the Devil May Cry 2025 Netflix series. And honestly? It was fine. Not my absolute favorite or anything I'd give it a solid 7 out of 10.

And the only reason it even gets that high?

The White Rabbit.


This man this GUY is so stupidly hot, I can’t even deal. The moment he showed up, I was done. The elegance, the voice, the vibe? Pure villain perfection. I knew right away I had to make a bot for him. He instantly became one of my all-time favorite villains.

So yeah, that’s the whole reason this bot exists. This dangerously handsome boy needs way more love fanart, fanfics, edits all of it. I am unwell. I’m out here dehydrated, y’all. Please, feed the fandom.I know he doesn’t have a huge spotlight in the original games (yet), but this might actually push me to check out the series for real. Oh, and let’s talk about the music. Absolute fire. The soundtrack is insane. I’ve had Evanescence - Afterlife (from the Netflix series "Devil May Cry") - Official Lyric Video on repeat ever since. Between the music and the fight scenes? Chef’s kiss.


━━━━━━◇❖◇━━━━━━━━━━◇❖◇━━━━━━━


(White rabbit from Devil May Cry Anime Netflix Series)
creator: Underskoopypearls
